name: SellerPayoutWriter

ironRules.rule: SETNX(payout-lock:{orderId}) MUST be ORDER 1 before any payout record write. Missing lock allows double payout on concurrent EscrowReleased events.
Only payoutVaultRef MUST be stored in payout records. bankAccountNumber, IBAN, routingNumber, sortCode, and accountName are PROHIBITED in any storeDocument call.
DNA-8: storeDocument(payoutRecord) MUST occur BEFORE enqueue(PayoutCompleted). PayoutCompleted event must reference an existing payout record.
tenantId MUST be resolved from AsyncLocalStorage only. Seller payout records must be scoped to the correct tenant — accepting tenantId from payload enables cross-tenant payout.

keywords: SellerPayoutWriter T612 SETNX payout-lock payoutVaultRef only bankAccountNumber IBAN routingNumber sortCode prohibited storeDocument PayoutCompleted EscrowReleased FLOW-16
